# Device Review and Completion Workflow (2025-12-28 03:18Z)

_**User (2025-12-28 03:23Z)**_

Read `StationpediaPlus/coordination/agent-instructions/REVIEW-INSTRUCTIONS.md` for the full workflow.

Your batch: `StationpediaPlus/coordination/outputs/review-batch-13.json`

For each device:
1. Find ALL logic types from `Stationeers/Stationpedia/Stationpedia.json`
2. Add descriptions for every missing type (use standard descriptions for generic types)
3. VERIFY Mode/Setting/Ratio/Error/Lock against source code in `Assembly-CSharp/`

Output COMPLETE device entries to: `StationpediaPlus/coordination/outputs/review-batch-13-complete.json`

Work autonomously. Read source code for device-specific types. Complete all devices before reporting.


---
